title: Enhanced Storage
body:
# Enhanced Storage

**This mod requires Refined Storage and Kotlin for Forge**

**This mod required Java 21 to run**

This mod is an all-in-one addon for Refined Storage, which integrate existing addons and add original content

All integrated mods are OSS and this project follow those license.

Current Contents are:

- Larger Storage Disks
- Upgraded Crafters
- Wireless Crafting Grid
- Universal Wireless Grid, which integrate Wireless Grid, Wireless Fluid Grid and Wireless Crafting Grid


## License Notice

- [Universal-Grid](https://github.com/starforcraft/Universal-Grid/tree/1.16) made by starforcraft, Licensed under [MIT License](https://opensource.org/license/mit)
- [Refined Storage Addons](https://github.com/refinedmods/refinedstorageaddons/tree/3b2675c8f60fefc8505fbdab1d3084c4f64ae5fa) made by raoulvdberge, Licensed under [MIT License](https://opensource.org/license/mit)
